name: W. S. Gilbert
abstract: Sir William Schwenck Gilbert (18 November 1836 – 29 May 1911) was an English dramatist, librettist, poet and illustrator best known for his collaboration with the composer Arthur Sullivan, which produced fourteen comic operas. The most famous of these include H.M.S.

Wedding March, An Eccentricity in Three Acts

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Hendricks
about_quotes.evidence: I begin to – as I begin to become a lyric writer and admire all the great lyricists – W. S. Gilbert and people like that
